tests.name: GET /health — Health Check should return HTTP 200
GET /health — Health Check response body should have status: "ok"
GET /health — Health Check response body should include service name and version
GET /health — Health Check Content-Type should be application/json
GET /health — Health Check should return HTTP 404 for an unknown route
GET /api/v1/status — Extended Status should return HTTP 200
GET /api/v1/status — Extended Status response body should have status: "operational"
GET /api/v1/status — Extended Status response body should include environment field
POST /api/v1/echo — Echo Endpoint should return HTTP 200
POST /api/v1/echo — Echo Endpoint should echo the request body under the "received" key
POST /api/v1/echo — Echo Endpoint should include an "echoedAt" ISO timestamp
